name: Southern Bank Of Tennessee
description_short: Community bank operating five locations across Tennessee with checking, savings, mortgage lending, and business banking services since 2012.
description_long: Southern Bank of Tennessee is a regional community bank founded in 2012, initially serving the Mt. Juliet, Tennessee area before expanding to four additional locations in Smyrna, Clinton, Brentwood, and Lebanon. The bank positions itself as a locally-rooted financial institution focused on serving families, businesses, and community members throughout Tennessee. The bank offers a comprehensive range of retail and business banking services including personal checking accounts, mortgage lending with flexible loan programs, home equity lines of credit, mobile banking, debit card services, and business banking through their "My Biz Intel" platform designed for small business owners. Their mortgage division emphasizes a local team with over 70 years of combined lending experience, on-site underwriting, and fast approvals. Current promotions include a 6% introductory APR for 6 months on home equity lines of credit with up to $750 toward closing costs. What distinguishes Southern Bank of Tennessee is their emphasis on local community presence and relationship-based banking rather than being a large national institution. They highlight their tenure in specific markets, their local mortgage team's experience, and their commitment to growing alongside the communities they serve. The bank maintains FDIC insurance backing and offers modern conveniences like mobile banking with remote check deposit capabilities. As a small regional bank, Southern Bank of Tennessee may have more limited product offerings and branch availability compared to larger national banks. Their competitive advantages center on personalized service and community focus rather than extensive product innovation or nationwide reach. For consumers seeking traditional banking services with local accountability in Tennessee, they represent a viable option, though rates and terms should be compared with larger competitors.
services: Mobile banking app with remote check deposit
Mortgage lending for home purchase and refinance
Debit card services with lost/stolen card support
Business banking through My Biz Intel platform
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Mobile banking app with remote check deposit at no charge
Local mortgage team with 70+ years combined lending experience
Five convenient branch locations across Tennessee (Mt. Juliet, Smyrna, Clinton, Brentwood, Lebanon)
Business banking platform (My Biz Intel) designed specifically for small business owners
Home equity line of credit with 6% introductory APR for 6 months and up to $750 closing cost assistance
Award-winning mortgage team with on-site underwriting and fast approval process
cons: Limited geographic footprint to Tennessee only with just five branch locations
Smaller bank may offer fewer specialized products or competitive rates compared to large national banks
No mention of CD rates, savings account APY rates, or detailed fee structures on website
Limited information about business loan products beyond My Biz Intel platform
No evidence of extended hours, weekend banking, or 24/7 customer service availability

contact.address: 675 N Mount Juliet Rd, Mount Juliet, TN 37122

best_for: Tennessee residents seeking a local community bank with personal service and accountability
Small business owners in Mt. Juliet, Smyrna, Clinton, Brentwood, or Lebanon areas
Homebuyers preferring local mortgage lenders with on-site underwriting and fast approval
Customers wanting mobile banking with remote deposit capabilities from a stable FDIC-insured institution
diagnosis: Southern Bank of Tennessee is best suited for Tennessee residents and small business owners seeking community-focused banking with personal service and local accountability. The main caveat is their limited geographic reach to five Tennessee locations and lack of detailed product rate information on their website, making rate and fee comparison with national competitors necessary before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 675 N Mount Juliet Rd, Mount Juliet, TN 37122
